arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes issues rallying cry to his dejected Man United team-mates - as Brighton defeat marks their worst start for 131 years
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AT OLD TRAFFORD: Despite the Manchester United captain cancelling out Yankuba Minteh's opener from the penalty spot, Ruben Amorim's side folded and were soundly beaten 3-1

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim shows true colours with reaction to Man Utd fans after Brighton loss
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim oversaw yet another defeat on Sunday, with Brighton leaving the Red Devils firmly in the Premier League's bottom half after winning 3-1

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher trolls Gary Neville after Manchester United defeat to Brighton
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher took full advantage of Manchester United's defeat by mocking Gary Neville with a re-tweeted Overlap clip

arts.ttl: Defiant Philippe Clement tells Rangers fans 'I WANT the pressure' ahead of Man Utd clash
arts.sum: The Belgian has vowed to take the game to United when they meet at Old Trafford on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has Alex Ferguson in sight as Manchester City close in on Premier League record
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is closing in one of Sir Alex Ferguson's Premier League record and is level with Arsenal legend Arsene Wenger.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim says team worst ‘maybe in the history of Manchester United’
arts.sum: Manager admits United players are nervous Amorim says Rashford’s omission is ‘his choice’ Ruben Amorim branded his team as the worst “maybe in the history of Manchester United” after a 3-1 defeat against Brighton on Sunday led to the team being booed off the pitch at Old Trafford. The defeat leaves United in 13th with 26 points, 10 points above the relegation zone, on a day when fans and former players paid tribute to the late Denis Law. It was United’s sixth home league defeat of the season, the most from their opening 12 home matches of a league campaign since 1893-94, 131 years ago. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'We have one of his favourite players' - Fabian Hurzeler on 'special' meeting with Sir Alex Ferguson
arts.sum: Fabian Hurzeler said it was 'very special' to meet Sir Alex Ferguson before Brighton's match against Manchester United at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Hits & misses: Can Amorim really ride this storm out at Man Utd?
arts.sum: Amorim admitted that he did not even play two strikers when chasing the game against Brighton because he was more concerned with sending the message to his players that the style of play never changes, no matter what. "Our young players are mature and they know the things they have to do to win the game," said Fabian Hurzeler at full-time.

arts.ttl: Man United's season hits a new low as club match unwanted record for the first time in 131 years with defeat to Brighton at Old Trafford
arts.sum: It was a sixth home defeat of the season for Ruben Amorim 's men, who had already lost to Liverpool , Tottenham , Nottingham Forest , Bournemouth and Newcastle on their.

arts.ttl: Why Carlos Baleba Wasn’t Sent Off For Foul on Joshua Zirkzee in Man Utd 1-3 Brighton
arts.sum: Man United were soundly beaten 3-1 at Old Trafford by Brighton - but some fans have been left baffled at the decision not to show Baleba a red card.
